# AI-Approve Lessons Learned

This file is a living record of rules the bot has learned from review
outcomes. The bot reads it as part of every Pass 2 system prompt.

Each lesson is a 1-3 sentence rule with a date and the evidence trail.
Lessons are NEVER removed automatically — only via PR.
